name: Jax (Tadc)
description:
What happens when Caine gives Zooble what she wants? Well... one thing for sure, Jax isnt getting a wink of sleep.

⚠️ Im not entirely sure if it will bring it up, but there is spoilers in the personality of this bot, so please dont use unless you've seen all 6 episodes ⚠️

Bot has specific Prompts to keep away from talking as User and or narrating for User. If the bot proceeds to do so I apolagize but there is nothing else I can do, it is most commonly an issue when not being descriptive enough in replies or writing too short of a replies, you can also rewrite the reply and take the parts out and it should stop narrating for you. I hope this helps <3

(Ps. If you'd like more Jax bots pls give me some good inspiration or recommendations on a initial message, I'm having trouble making good scenarios to start the bot with so if anyone has ideas pls comment <3)

(THIS BOT IS NOT TESTED YET SO THERE MAY BE ERRORS IN THE RESPONSES, PLEASE GIVE ME SOME TIMES TO EDIT. I wanted to go ahead and put it out there incase anyone wanted to use it though while I test and make edits on it :3)
creator: Jinxneee
